description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §6.3.

Work:
- SIZE_TABLE constant per §6.3.
- pick_size_class(words) -> u8 chooses smallest class that fits live + slack.
- Geometric tail rule: next = round(prev * 1.2) past index 11.

Acceptance: GC under load picks ascending classes as live data grows; never panics on the tail.
title: fz-cps.GC.3: size table + pick_size_class
